summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PM Work Order lifecycle and Kanban modal time edit features. Backend: all 29 tests passed covering PM task completion triggering WO PENDING_ADMIN_CLOSURE transition, admin notifications with target_role='admin', time edit permissions (admin/assigned tech only), duration recomputation, and validation (400 for end<start, 403 for non-assigned tech). Frontend: all features verified including WO detail modal on card click, editable datetime-local inputs for start/end times with save functionality, duration updates after save, stopPropagation on action buttons, and tech user permission checks (enabled for assigned WOs, disabled for non-assigned).
passed_tests: Backend: PM task completion transitions linked WO (pm_task_id match, status OPEN/ASSIGNED/IN_PROGRESS) to PENDING_ADMIN_CLOSURE
Backend: PM completion creates notification with target_role='admin' and 'Admin Review Required' title
Backend: PM completion sets WO completed_at timestamp and duration_minutes
Backend: Tech cannot close PENDING_ADMIN_CLOSURE WO (403 Forbidden)
Backend: Admin can close PENDING_ADMIN_CLOSURE WO (200 OK, status becomes CLOSED)
Backend: PUT /api/work-orders/{id} action='update' with started_at/completed_at - admin can edit times
Backend: PUT /api/work-orders/{id} - duration_minutes recomputed correctly (60.0 min for 1-hour span)
Backend: PUT /api/work-orders/{id} - assigned tech can edit times for their WO
Backend: PUT /api/work-orders/{id} - duration recomputed for tech edit (150.0 min for 2.5-hour span)
Backend: PUT /api/work-orders/{id} - 400 Bad Request when completed_at < started_at
Backend: PUT /api/work-orders/{id} - 403 Forbidden for non-assigned tech trying to edit times
Backend: PUT /api/work-orders/{id} - 403 Forbidden for operator (non-admin, non-tech) trying to edit times
Frontend: Work Orders page loads with Kanban view as default
Frontend: Kanban displays 5 columns (OPEN, ASSIGNED, IN_PROGRESS, ADMIN CLOSURE, CLOSED)
Frontend: WO cards show wo_number, title, machine_name, wo_type, assigned_to, created_at
Frontend: Clicking WO card opens detail modal (data-testid='wo-detail-modal')
Frontend: Modal displays WO number (data-testid='wo-detail-number')
Frontend: Modal displays title, machine, type, assigned, duration fields
Frontend: Modal has Start Time input (data-testid='wo-detail-start-time', type='datetime-local')
Frontend: Modal has End Time input (data-testid='wo-detail-end-time', type='datetime-local')
Frontend: Admin user - time inputs are enabled (not disabled)
Frontend: Admin can edit start/end times and click Save Times button (data-testid='wo-detail-save-times')
Frontend: Duration updates in modal after saving times (60 min for 1-hour difference)
Frontend: Modal shows action buttons (Start, Complete, Admin Close) based on WO status
Frontend: Preventive WO modal shows 'PM Closeout Page' button (data-testid='wo-detail-pm-page-btn')
Frontend: Action buttons on cards use stopPropagation (clicking button does NOT open modal)
Frontend: Tech user can login and access Work Orders page
Frontend: Tech user - time inputs enabled for WO assigned to tech
Frontend: Tech user - time inputs disabled for WO not assigned to tech (read-only)

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all features verified - modal, time edits, permissions, stopPropagation)
